result.description: Visitors Logbook. A paper-based visitor logbook where individuals manually write their name, reason for visit, time in/out, and provide a signature. Multiple entries are visible.
keyFindings: Manual entry system, dependent on handwriting.
Prone to errors, illegible writing, and falsification.
No automatic time tracking—relies on honesty and accuracy of the visitor.
Contains compliance documentation requiring regulatory review
May include policy or procedure information requiring governance
